channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by SWG for La7, 3–8 June 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Ora! (*): 0 seats
  • Noi Moderati (EPP): 0 seats
  • Italia Viva (RE): 0 seats
  • Più Europa (RE): 0 seats
  • Fratelli d’Italia (ECR): 22–27 seats
  • Futuro Nazionale (NI): 0–5 seats
  • Partito Progressista (*): 0–1 seats
  • Partito Democratico (S&D): 17–21 seats
  • Movimento 5 Stelle (GUE/NGL): 10–13 seats
  • Forza Italia (EPP): 4–7 seats
  • Azione (RE): 0–5 seats
  • Sinistra Italiana (GUE/NGL): 1–3 seats
  • Lega Nord (PfE): 4–6 seats
  • Europa Verde (Greens/EFA): 3–4 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by SWG for La7, 3–8 June 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by SWG for La7, 3–8 June 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Ora! (*): 0.6–1.8%
  • Noi Moderati (EPP): 0.7–2.0%
  • Italia Viva (RE): 1.7–3.5%
  • Più Europa (RE): 0.9–2.4%
  • Fratelli d’Italia (ECR): 25.8–31.0%
  • Futuro Nazionale (NI): 3.7–6.2%
  • Partito Progressista (*): 0.3–1.2%
  • Partito Democratico (S&D): 19.7–24.4%
  • Movimento 5 Stelle (GUE/NGL): 11.3–15.1%
  • Forza Italia (EPP): 5.7–8.6%
  • Azione (RE): 2.7–4.8%
  • Sinistra Italiana (GUE/NGL): 1.6–3.4%
  • Lega Nord (PfE): 4.4–7.0%
  • Europa Verde (Greens/EFA): 2.7–4.8%

item.title: Opinion Poll by Tecnè for Agenzia Dire, 4–5 June 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by Tecnè for Agenzia Dire, 4–5 June 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Noi Moderati (EPP): 0.5–1.8%
  • Italia Viva (RE): 1.5–3.4%
  • Più Europa (RE): 0.8–2.2%
  • Fratelli d’Italia (ECR): 26.6–32.2%
  • Futuro Nazionale (NI): 2.8–5.2%
  • Partito Progressista (*): 0.3–1.3%
  • Partito Democratico (S&D): 19.3–24.5%
  • Movimento 5 Stelle (GUE/NGL): 10.6–14.7%
  • Forza Italia (EPP): 7.2–10.7%
  • Azione (RE): 2.0–4.1%
  • Sinistra Italiana (GUE/NGL): 1.5–3.4%
  • Lega Nord (PfE): 5.5–8.7%
  • Europa Verde (Greens/EFA): 2.5–4.8%
